name: 05-05-chat-sidecar-context
title: Chat sidecar should be conversation-focused
description: Replace project-like NPC profile/asset/map metadata in the tavern chat sidebar with context that helps the visitor continue the conversation.
creator: lijin
notes: Replaced project-like visitor sidebar with conversation-focused chat assistance and added tests/Playwright checks to keep old NPC profile thumbnails and raw tavern metadata out of the chat sidecar.
